mapper.sql: ss2.XH, ss2.KSQJ, ss2.SDQJ, ss2.gph, ss2.SFZH, ss2.XM, ss2.SRZE, ss2.FDFYKCE, ss2.YNSSDE, ss2.SL, ss2.SSKCS, ss2.YNSE_NULL, ss2.YNSE_ZE

${tAlias}.XH as ${tAlias}_XH, ${tAlias}.KSQJ as ${tAlias}_KSQJ, ${tAlias}.SDQJ as ${tAlias}_SDQJ, ${tAlias}.gph as ${tAlias}_gph, ${tAlias}.SFZH as ${tAlias}_SFZH, ${tAlias}.XM as ${tAlias}_XM, ${tAlias}.SRZE as ${tAlias}_SRZE, ${tAlias}.FDFYKCE as ${tAlias}_FDFYKCE, ${tAlias}.YNSSDE as ${tAlias}_YNSSDE, ${tAlias}.SL as ${tAlias}_SL, ${tAlias}.SSKCS as ${tAlias}_SSKCS, ${tAlias}.YNSE_NULL as ${tAlias}_YNSE_NULL, ${tAlias}.YNSE_ZE as ${tAlias}_YNSE_ZE
mapper.insert: insert into swm_salatax_2006 (XH, KSQJ, SDQJ, gph, SFZH, XM, SRZE, FDFYKCE, YNSSDE, SL, SSKCS, YNSE_NULL, YNSE_ZE) values (#{xh,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ksqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sdqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gph,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sfzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{srze,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{fdfykce,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{ynssde,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{sl,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{sskcs,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{ynseNull,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ynseZe,jdbcType=DOUBLE})
mapper.update: update swm_salatax_2006 set XH = #{xh,jdbcType=INTEGER}, KSQJ = #{ksqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SDQJ = #{sdqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gph = #{gph,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SFZH = #{sfzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, XM = #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SRZE = #{srze,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, FDFYKCE = #{fdfykce,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, YNSSDE = #{ynssde,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, SL = #{sl,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, SSKCS = #{sskcs,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, YNSE_NULL = #{ynseNull,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, YNSE_ZE = #{ynseZe,jdbcType=DOUBLE}
mapper.select:
select
from swm_salatax_2006 ss2 where RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( ss2.GPH ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )
